DEPT. 2, JUDGE CHOPPELAS, CSR MAUREEN BRADY, CLERK E.MONTI 9:35 AM C/C FOR COURT TRIAL. PLTF PRESENT IN PRO PER. DEFT NOT PRESENT. PLTF SWORN FOR TRIAL. PLTF'S PRAYER: RENT/DAM- AGES $450.00, COSTS $80.00. EXH. 1 - NOTICE OF TIME/PLACE OF TRIAL EXH. 2 - THREE DAY NOTICE THESE EXHIBITS ARE ADMITTED INTO EVIDENCE, UNMARKED, AS THEY ARE PART OF THE FILE. THE COURT AWARDS JUDGMENT FOR THE PLTF AS FOLLOWS: REST & POSS OF THE PREMISES LOCATED AT 88 SIXTH ST. #434. RENT/ DAMAGES ARE $450.00 & COURT COSTS OF $80.00. WRIT TO ISSUE IMMEDIATELY. PLTF TO PREPARE JUDGMENT.

THE COURT ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT CONNERY, RICHARD THE RESTITUTION AND POSSESSION OF THE PREMISES: DELTA HOTEL, 88-6TH ST. RM. 434 SAN FRANCISCO, CA $450.00 RENT, $80.00 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $530.00, LEASE FORFEITED
